name: HMGCC SPA - Research & Document Library Builder

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO notes (project_id, related_type, note_type, content, tags)
SELECT p.id, 'document', 'reference-library', $1, string_to_array($2, ',')
FROM projects p WHERE p.slug = 'sjms'
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM notes n WHERE n.content LIKE ('%' || $3 || '%') AND n.note_type = 'reference-library')
RETURNING id;
